extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a medium value (around 0.2) and first moves noticeably downward.
R2: After an early small trough, the series rises steeply to a single dominant peak around the middle.
R3: After this main peak, the series stays relatively high for a while before gradually declining toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts near zero and stays low and flat for an extended initial segment.
R2: After this flat part, the series rises smoothly and steadily to a single dominant peak around the middle.
R3: After the peak, the series declines more or less monotonically toward the end, without a long high plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts from a relatively higher value and then slightly decreases or stays flat in the early time steps.  
R2: After a low or nearly flat middle section, the series rises sharply to a single prominent peak around the central time steps.  
R3: Following the peak, the series gradually decreases toward the end without returning to the initial starting level.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts from a relatively low value and stays low or slightly decreasing for several initial time steps.  
R2: After this low plateau, the series increases more gradually at first, then sharply, reaching a prominent peak slightly later than in Class 0.  
R3: After the peak, the series decreases steadily toward the end, dropping closer to the baseline than in Class 0.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts with a moderate value (around 0.2) and declines to a local minimum near 0 around time 5.  
R2: After time 5 the series rises steeply, peaking early (around time 12) at about 0.7.  
R3: After this early peak the series shows a secondary high plateau and then decreases gradually toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts near 0 and stays very low (close to 0) for a longer initial segment, up to about time 6.  
R2: After time 6 the series rises more gradually and reaches its main peak later (around time 13) at about 0.7.  
R3: After this late peak the series declines more smoothly without a pronounced secondary plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively higher value (around 0.2) and then slightly decreases or stays flat during the first third of the time.
R2: A sharp increase occurs from the middle of the series to a first main peak around 0.7, followed by a small dip and another nearby peak (double-peak structure).
R3: After the second peak, the series decreases but remains at a moderate level (around 0.3–0.5) before a final drop near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a lower value (close to 0.05) and stays very low and flat during the first third of the time.
R2: From the middle to about two-thirds of the series, there is a strong rise to a single dominant peak around 0.7, then a drop to a mid-level (around 0.5).
R3: After this, the series steadily declines from mid-level values down to a low value near the end, without maintaining an extended moderate plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series begins at a relatively high value (around 0.2) and decreases to near 0 by about time 5.  
R2: After time 5, the series stays near 0 until roughly time 8–9, then rises steeply to a peak above 0.6 around time 12.  
R3: After the peak, the series remains elevated (above ~0.5) for several time steps before gradually declining toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins near 0, stays low (below ~0.1) and slightly decreasing until around time 5.  
R2: From about time 5 to 12, the series steadily increases from near 0 to a peak above 0.6 around time 12.  
R3: After the peak, the series quickly drops from high values (above ~0.6) down toward ~0.1–0.2 by the end, with no prolonged high plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first third of the series (early time steps), the values are relatively high (around 0.2) and then decrease toward near‑zero.  
R2: In the middle of the series, the values rise sharply from near‑zero to a clear peak (around 0.7).  
R3: In the last third of the series, the values decline from that peak but remain moderately high (around 0.3–0.5) for some time before ending a bit lower.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first third of the series, the values stay very low and flat, hovering near zero with only tiny variations.  
R2: In the middle of the series, the values increase more gradually from this flat low level and then surge to a high peak (around 0.7).  
R3: After the peak, the values fall steadily and almost monotonically back toward low values by the end of the series.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first third of the series, values start around a medium level and quickly drop to near-zero, then stay almost flat.
R2: In the middle of the series, values rise sharply from near-zero to a single dominant peak, then form a broad high plateau with small fluctuations.
R3: In the last third of the series, values decline steadily from that high plateau back toward low/medium levels.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first third of the series, values start very low and remain close to zero with only a slight dip and no early plateau at a medium level.
R2: Around the middle of the series, values rise from near-zero to a sharp, narrow peak and then drop more abruptly than in Class 0.
R3: In the last third of the series, values keep decreasing from the mid peak with no secondary broad plateau, ending at very low values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts relatively high (around 0.2) and decreases to near 0 by index 5.  
R2: From roughly index 6 to 13, the series rises steeply from near 0 to a peak above 0.6–0.7.  
R3: After the peak, the series forms a broad plateau with values mostly between 0.4 and 0.7 before finally decreasing toward 0.2 by the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts low (below ~0.1), stays near 0 until around index 6–7, and then begins to rise.  
R2: From roughly index 7 to 13, the series rises smoothly and steeply from near 0 to a peak above 0.6–0.7.  
R3: After the peak, the series decreases more steadily than in Class 0, falling from above 0.6 to near 0.1 by the end without a long high plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a medium value (around 0.2) and decreases quickly to near zero within the first 5–6 time steps.  
R2: After staying near zero for a short interval, the series rises steeply to a single main peak around time 12–13, reaching roughly 0.7.  
R3: From this peak, the series declines with a broad hump (secondary, lower peak) before ending at a medium‑low level (around 0.2–0.3).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a low value (around 0.05–0.1) and remains low and flat for the first 5–7 time steps.  
R2: After this flat part, the series increases more gradually at first, then very sharply to a single main peak around time 12–13, reaching roughly 0.7.  
R3: From this peak, the series declines smoothly and nearly monotonically (no pronounced secondary hump), ending again at a low value (around 0.1–0.2).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2) and drops quickly to near 0 around time 4–6.  
R2: After staying very low for a short period, it rises steeply from near 0 to a first major peak above 0.6 around time 12–13.  
R3: After this first peak, it falls to around 0.5, rises again to a smaller peak, then decreases steadily toward the end but remains above 0.15.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a low value (below 0.1) and remains near 0 for a longer initial segment (up to about time 7–8) before clearly rising.  
R2: From this low plateau it rises smoothly and steeply to a single dominant peak above 0.65 around time 12–13, without an earlier high peak.  
R3: After the main peak, it shows a smaller local bump but then declines more sharply and reaches values close to 0.1 or below near the end.
